jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Babyoye
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Babyoye:
Babyoye is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye!
